speaker: Manager
text: I need to inform you that your position is being eliminated effective this Friday. 💧

speaker: Employee
text: I have been with this organisation for six years without a single negative performance review. 🌋
emotion_cause: loyal service met with abrupt termination

speaker: Manager
text: This decision came directly from the executive team and was not about your performance at all. 🤝

speaker: Employee
text: Six years of my life and you give me three days notice — that is quite the send-off. 💅

speaker: Manager
text: We are offering a generous severance package and full outplacement support from today. 🤝

speaker: Employee
text: A severance package does not replace six years of career investment in this company.

speaker: Manager
text: I understand your anger and I genuinely believe this decision is unjust as well. 📉

speaker: Employee
text: Then why are you the one sitting across this table delivering the news to me.

speaker: Director
text: The board approved a twenty percent bonus for the entire engineering organisation. 🔥

speaker: Senior_Dev
text: I genuinely did not see that coming after the difficulty of this past quarter. 🎇

speaker: Director
text: Your team shipped three products under budget and ahead of every scheduled milestone. 🌟

speaker: Junior_Dev
text: Does that include contractors or only full-time employees in this cycle. 🎯

speaker: Director
text: Full-time only this cycle but we are actively advocating for contractor inclusion next year. 🙏

speaker: Senior_Dev
text: This kind of recognition is exactly what makes people genuinely want to stay here. 🙌

speaker: Junior_Dev
text: I have been underpaid for two years but I will take this as a meaningful starting point. 🌅

speaker: HR_Manager
text: Several colleagues have independently reported identical patterns of behaviour from the director.

speaker: Employee_A
text: I reported this exact issue three months ago and was told to work it out directly with him. 🧨

speaker: HR_Manager
text: That response was completely wrong and I apologise unreservedly on behalf of this organisation. 🙏

speaker: Employee_B
text: What actually happens now because that man still walks into this building every single morning. 😰
emotion_cause: harasser continuing normal access to workplace

speaker: HR_Manager
text: He is suspended pending a full independent investigation that begins today without exception. ✅

speaker: Employee_A
text: I have watched other women leave this company because of him and I said nothing each time. 🕯️
emotion_cause: guilt over silence while others suffered and left

speaker: HR_Manager
text: Your speaking up today has protected people who do not yet know they were at risk.

speaker: Employee_A
text: I discovered that every male peer in my salary band earns fifteen percent more than I do. 💥

speaker: Employee_B
text: That is not a rounding error or an oversight — that is a deliberate structural policy. 😏
emotion_cause: pay gap identified as intentional practice

speaker: Employee_A
text: HR told me pay is based on negotiation history and individual performance calibration scores.
emotion_cause: HR explanation felt like deliberate misdirection

speaker: Employee_B
text: Translation — they rewarded whoever negotiated hardest and called that meritocracy. 💅

speaker: Employee_A
text: I have the highest performance rating in this team for three consecutive annual cycles. 🔥
emotion_cause: strong performance not reflected in compensation

speaker: Employee_B
text: Document every data point and get an employment lawyer to review before you escalate formally. 🚨
emotion_cause: strategic advice to build strongest possible case

speaker: Employee_A
text: I am not leaving quietly and I am not going to pretend this situation is remotely acceptable.
emotion_cause: commitment to fight pay discrimination openly

speaker: Analyst
text: The financial statements being submitted to regulators contain fabricated revenue figures for three quarters. 🕵️

speaker: Compliance_Lead
text: You need to be completely certain before you take this any further with anyone. 🩹

speaker: Analyst
text: I have three years of reconciliation files that show precisely where the numbers diverge from reality. ✅

speaker: Compliance_Lead
text: If you are right then every executive who signed those filings is personally and criminally liable. 🌀
emotion_cause: full scale of fraud becoming clear

speaker: Analyst
text: I know exactly what reporting this means for my career and I am reporting it anyway. 🕵️

speaker: Compliance_Lead
text: I will go with you to the external regulator — you should not walk into that office alone.
emotion_cause: personal support offered in dangerous act

speaker: Analyst
text: I have been losing sleep over this for two months and I simply cannot carry it any longer.
emotion_cause: prolonged moral burden from sustained silence

speaker: Employee
text: I submitted a two-week medical leave request for burnout and exhaustion this morning. 😢
emotion_cause: burnout serious enough to require medical leave

speaker: Manager
text: I am glad you did that and I am genuinely sorry you reached this point on my watch. 🙏
emotion_cause: manager feels responsible for employee's burnout

speaker: Employee
text: I tried to signal the problem twice but the signals I sent were far too subtle to land. 😔

speaker: Manager
text: I should have asked you directly and explicitly how you were holding up — that is entirely on me. 🥀
emotion_cause: manager accepts failure to monitor wellbeing

speaker: Employee
text: I am not angry at you — I am just completely empty and I need time to recover properly. 😞

speaker: Manager
text: Take the full two weeks and do not open your email once — I mean that as a direct instruction. 🤝
emotion_cause: explicit permission to fully disconnect given

speaker: Employee
text: Can we talk about workload structure when I return because something fundamental has to change here. 📅
emotion_cause: planning structural reform after recovery period

speaker: Developer
text: She has added herself to every single calendar invite I have for the past six straight weeks. 🙄

speaker: Colleague
text: Does she review your pull requests before your own team lead does now as well. 🧐

speaker: Developer
text: She left eighteen comments on a prototype that was never scheduled to ship to anyone. 🍄

speaker: Colleague
text: Eighteen comments on a throwaway prototype is genuinely extraordinary in the worst way. 🎇

speaker: Developer
text: I cannot concentrate because every single decision feels like a test I might fail publicly.

speaker: Colleague
text: Have you tried naming the dynamic directly without naming the specific behaviour pattern. 🔭

speaker: Developer
text: I tried once and she described herself as being thorough and supportive in her approach. 💅

speaker: Colleague
text: Then you document the pattern carefully and escalate it formally or you start looking outward. 🛡️

speaker: Founder
text: Every single investor we pitched to last week passed on us without serious engagement. 📉

speaker: CTO
text: All five of them said the market is too small — every one of them used that exact phrase. 😭
emotion_cause: repeated market size objection feels definitive

speaker: Founder
text: They cannot see what we are building and they have already decided based on category alone. 🤨

speaker: CTO
text: Maybe we are pitching to entirely the wrong category of investor for this particular thesis. 🔭

speaker: Founder
text: That is actually a very good point — we have been targeting pure SaaS growth funds exclusively. 🤯
emotion_cause: realisation about fundamentally wrong investor type

speaker: CTO
text: Deep tech and climate infrastructure funds might read our thesis in a completely different way. 📅

speaker: Founder
text: Let me rebuild the entire target list by Friday and we go again with completely fresh energy.
emotion_cause: commitment to pivot pitch strategy entirely

speaker: Employee_A
text: The CEO hired his nephew as Head of Product over four strong internal candidates this week. 🤮
emotion_cause: nepotism observed at senior leadership level

speaker: Employee_B
text: The nephew has eighteen months of product experience — a truly inspired appointment.

speaker: Employee_A
text: One of those internal candidates has been here eight years and shipped twelve successful products.

speaker: Employee_B
text: I have stopped being surprised by this and started being strategic about my own future options.

speaker: Employee_A
text: The problem is that being strategic means leaving a company I have genuinely loved working for.
emotion_cause: forced choice between integrity and attachment

speaker: Employee_B
text: Sometimes love for a place and clear-eyed understanding of its ceiling are not mutually exclusive feelings.
emotion_cause: wisdom about holding both truths simultaneously

speaker: Employee_A
text: I am going to update my CV this weekend — not as a dramatic statement but simply as a hedge. 🛡️

speaker: Incident_Lead
text: Production is completely down and sixty thousand active users cannot access their data right now.

speaker: Senior_Eng
text: The primary database cluster failed over but the replica was three hours behind in sync. 🕵️
emotion_cause: root cause of outage precisely identified

speaker: Incident_Lead
text: How long to restore service from the last verified clean backup we have available. 🧐

speaker: Senior_Eng
text: Four hours minimum — the backup validation process is the bottleneck not the restore itself. 📉
emotion_cause: long recovery time confirmed with specifics

speaker: Incident_Lead
text: Draft customer communication now and assume the four-hour window in your messaging today.

speaker: Senior_Eng
text: The reason this replica was stale is because someone disabled the sync job last Tuesday. 😡
emotion_cause: preventable failure caused by undocumented change

speaker: Incident_Lead
text: We investigate cause after we restore full service — in exactly that order every single time.
emotion_cause: process discipline maintained under severe pressure

speaker: Senior_Mgr
text: We are restructuring your role into a senior individual contributor position going forward. 😲

speaker: Team_Lead
text: That is a demotion by every meaningful definition except the specific word you are choosing.

speaker: Senior_Mgr
text: The new structure reflects where the company most needs depth and expertise right now. ✅

speaker: Team_Lead
text: I turned down two external offers in the past year because I trusted the path here explicitly.

speaker: Senior_Mgr
text: Those decisions were yours and I am not dismissing how deeply unfair this moment feels. 🤝

speaker: Team_Lead
text: I need twenty-four hours before I can have a professional conversation about the details. 🧐

speaker: Senior_Mgr
text: That is completely fair and reasonable — take the time you need without pressure. 🛡️

speaker: CEO
text: The acquisition was announced this morning and our entire company is now owned by our main competitor. 🤯

speaker: Lead_Eng
text: We built this product for five years specifically to compete against them — this is genuinely surreal. 🌀

speaker: CEO
text: The terms are very favourable and every employee receives full vesting acceleration effective today. ✨

speaker: Lead_Eng
text: I do not know whether to feel relieved that it is over or betrayed that this is how it ends. 🌀

speaker: CEO
text: The acquiring team specifically requested that the entire engineering organisation stay completely intact. ✅
emotion_cause: team explicitly valued by acquiring company

speaker: Lead_Eng
text: I need at least a week to process this fully before I can decide what I genuinely want to do. 👍

speaker: CEO
text: That is entirely reasonable and your position is completely secure while you think it through. 🍃

speaker: Manager
text: I was not expecting your resignation letter to arrive today — I will be honest with you about that. ⚡

speaker: Employee
text: I have been unhappy here for a long time and I waited far too long to say something direct. 😞

speaker: Manager
text: What would have changed this outcome if I had actually known about it sooner. 🔭

speaker: Employee
text: More genuine autonomy and fewer status meetings that replaced actual productive work time. 🙏

speaker: Manager
text: I hear that and I genuinely wish we had had this exact conversation nine months ago.
emotion_cause: regret over missed opportunity to retain

speaker: Employee
text: I am leaving on genuinely good terms — this company gave me a great deal and I mean that.

speaker: Manager
text: Where are you headed if you are comfortable sharing that with me. 💡

speaker: Employee
text: Somewhere smaller where I can actually see the direct impact of everything I build every day. 🚀
emotion_cause: seeking more meaningful and visible impact

speaker: Manager
text: Your client presentation and Marcus's pitch deck are seventy percent structurally identical.

speaker: Employee
text: He sat directly next to me for three hours while I built that entire deck last Tuesday. 💥
emotion_cause: plagiarist was physically present during creation

speaker: Manager
text: Why did you not flag it the moment you saw his version circulating in the organisation.

speaker: Employee
text: Because I thought I was losing my mind and nobody would believe me over someone his level. 😨
emotion_cause: power imbalance made reporting feel genuinely unsafe

speaker: Manager
text: I believe you right now and so will everyone who examines the file metadata timestamps. ✅

speaker: Employee
text: That presentation has my client relationship embedded on every single slide and he walked in alone.
emotion_cause: deep betrayal by trusted senior colleague

speaker: Manager
text: This is being escalated to HR and legal today — do not contact him directly under any circumstances. 🚨

speaker: Employee
text: I requested a standing desk adjustment six weeks ago and have received nothing but promises. 💢

speaker: HR
text: The procurement process for specialist equipment requires three separate levels of approval. 🤝

speaker: Employee
text: My condition causes significant pain after forty minutes of sitting and I am in pain every afternoon. 😞
emotion_cause: daily physical suffering due to inaction

speaker: HR
text: I was not aware the health impact was this immediate and significant — I apologise for that.

speaker: Employee
text: I included that information in the initial request form and in both follow-up emails I sent.

speaker: HR
text: I am escalating this as a health and safety matter today rather than a procurement request. 🧐

speaker: Employee
text: Six weeks of pain because of a category on a form — I need you to understand how that feels. 🕯️

speaker: Friend_1
text: I need to tell you something I have been sitting with for three months and I cannot any longer. 😰

speaker: Friend_2
text: You are scaring me a little right now — please just say what it is. ⚠️

speaker: Friend_1
text: I was the person who told your ex where you were living after you moved last year. 🤮

speaker: Friend_2
text: You told him where I was after I spent six months hiding from him for my own safety.

speaker: Friend_1
text: I did not know the full picture at all — I thought you had ended things normally. 🙏
emotion_cause: action taken without critical safety context

speaker: Friend_2
text: I told you directly that it was not a safe situation and you still gave him my location. 💢
emotion_cause: warning was given clearly and ignored

speaker: Friend_1
text: I have lived with this guilt every single day since I found out what he had actually been doing. 😔
emotion_cause: profound guilt after learning true consequences

speaker: Friend_2
text: I need you to leave right now and I need significant time before I can look at you again. 😭

speaker: Friend_1
text: We are all here together because we are genuinely terrified for you and we love you enormously. 🥰
emotion_cause: group intervention driven purely by care

speaker: Subject
text: I knew something was happening when you all suggested lunch at the same time like that. 🌪️
emotion_cause: group gathering felt staged and worrying

speaker: Friend_2
text: You have lost twelve kilograms in eight weeks and you honestly think we would not notice that. 💧

speaker: Subject
text: I am fine — I have just been working far too hard and not prioritising eating enough. 🛰️

speaker: Friend_1
text: We are not doing this to embarrass you — we are doing this because we are genuinely terrified. 🆘
emotion_cause: deep fear for friend's life driving action

speaker: Subject
text: If I actually admit how bad it has gotten then I have to deal with it and I am not ready. ⚠️
emotion_cause: avoidance driven by fear of consequences

speaker: Friend_2
text: You do not have to be ready alone — that is literally why every one of us is sitting here. 🥰

speaker: Subject
text: I know that I need help. I have known for quite a while now. 👌

speaker: Friend_1
text: I will be completely honest with you — I felt a flash of jealousy when you announced the book deal. 😔

speaker: Friend_2
text: I appreciate you saying that directly rather than just smiling warmly and hiding it. 🫡

speaker: Friend_1
text: You have worked toward this specific goal for ten years and my reaction should have been pure joy. 🙏

speaker: Friend_2
text: Jealousy does not make you a bad friend — it means you want something meaningful for yourself too. 🛡️

speaker: Friend_1
text: I think it surfaced all the ways I have been deferring my own creative work indefinitely. 🧐
emotion_cause: jealousy as signal about unmet personal aspiration

speaker: Friend_2
text: Then use it as information — let it tell you something useful instead of making you feel guilty. 🌅

speaker: Friend_1
text: I am genuinely so proud of you and I am sorry the two feelings got tangled up together.

speaker: Friend_1
text: I think we have been performing a closeness that we are not actually maintaining anymore. 📓

speaker: Friend_2
text: That is a painful thing to say out loud but you are absolutely not wrong about it. 💧

speaker: Friend_1
text: Our lives have just gone in genuinely different directions in these last three years. 👍

speaker: Friend_2
text: The caring is entirely still there — that part has not changed at all for me.

speaker: Friend_1
text: The caring is there but we have stopped actually knowing who the other person is becoming. 😞
emotion_cause: relationship existing primarily in past tense

speaker: Friend_2
text: Is this a goodbye conversation or is it a wake-up call conversation — I need to understand. 🎯
emotion_cause: seeking to understand the intent here

speaker: Friend_1
text: It is a conversation where we are honest about where we are and see what we can rebuild together. ✅
emotion_cause: honesty as foundation for possible renewal

speaker: Friend_2
text: Then I am fully in for that conversation — every honest bit of it. 📈

speaker: Hiker_1
text: I have been to sixty countries and I have never seen anything in my life like what we are looking at.
emotion_cause: natural landscape exceeding all prior experience

speaker: Hiker_2
text: We walked for nine hours today and I would repeat every single step for this exact moment.
emotion_cause: extreme effort entirely justified by experience

speaker: Hiker_1
text: Standing in front of this makes every problem I brought with me feel genuinely and completely tiny. 🏙️

speaker: Hiker_2
text: The scale of it is almost frightening — do you feel that particular quality in it too. 🌠

speaker: Hiker_1
text: Something this large has no business being this beautiful — those two things should not coexist. 🎇
emotion_cause: scale and beauty experienced as impossible combination

speaker: Hiker_2
text: I cannot stop looking and simultaneously cannot fully take it in — both feelings at once. 🏙️

speaker: Hiker_1
text: This is why we do this — to feel completely alive and completely small at the exact same moment.
emotion_cause: meaning found in natural transcendent experience

speaker: Friend_1
text: Two years of complete silence and you are the one who finally reached out — why specifically now.
emotion_cause: questioning motive for reconnection after long gap

speaker: Friend_2
text: Because I had a health scare and realised I had let something irreplaceable quietly decay. 😢
emotion_cause: mortality prompting reconnection with what matters

speaker: Friend_1
text: I thought about reaching out so many times and always found a reason not to take the step.
emotion_cause: repeated inaction despite genuine desire to reconnect

speaker: Friend_2
text: The argument that ended us was not worth two years of this silence — it simply was not. 👍

speaker: Friend_1
text: I was so convinced I was right that I did not notice how lonely I was steadily becoming.
emotion_cause: pride as mechanism of self-imposed isolation

speaker: Friend_2
text: I am not remotely interested in who was right — I am interested in whether we still have something. 🛡️
emotion_cause: moving past blame toward genuine possibility

speaker: Friend_1
text: We do — I knew that the moment I read your message and my chest loosened. 💞
emotion_cause: friendship recognised as still alive and worth saving

speaker: Observer_1
text: She solved a problem that four dedicated research teams failed to crack across an entire decade. 🙌

speaker: Observer_2
text: I sat three rows back when she presented and I genuinely could not breathe properly.
emotion_cause: physical response to witnessing landmark work

speaker: Observer_1
text: The entire room went completely silent for about thirty seconds after she finished the proof. 🏙️

speaker: Observer_2
text: There are moments in a career when you know you are in the presence of something genuinely historic. 🙌
emotion_cause: historical significance of moment fully recognised

speaker: Observer_1
text: She just stood there waiting for questions as if she had done something entirely ordinary. 👏
emotion_cause: contrast between achievement and profound humility

speaker: Observer_2
text: I feel genuinely lucky that I happened to be in that specific room when it occurred.
emotion_cause: gratitude for witnessing rare pivotal event

speaker: Friend_1
text: I have decided to drop my legal case against the landlord even though I am completely in the right. 🙇
emotion_cause: choosing peace and sanity over vindication

speaker: Friend_2
text: You are completely certain the documentation supports your position thoroughly.
emotion_cause: verifying that surrender is strategic not mistaken

speaker: Friend_1
text: Entirely certain — but the legal process will cost me two years of my life and my mental health.
emotion_cause: strategic surrender chosen with clear eyes

speaker: Friend_2
text: So you are stepping down not because you are wrong but because the fight is no longer worth it. 🎯

speaker: Friend_1
text: Precisely. I am choosing my wellbeing and my future over the satisfaction of winning publicly. 🤐
emotion_cause: conscious deliberate choice to defer to reality

speaker: Friend_2
text: That takes more genuine strength than simply fighting it out would have.

speaker: Friend_1
text: I am still angry about the injustice and I am simultaneously at peace with the decision. 🤝
emotion_cause: anger and peace coexisting without contradiction

speaker: Friend_1
text: I am going to be honest with you because I genuinely care about what happens to you. 🚫
emotion_cause: moral disapproval expressed from place of care

speaker: Friend_2
text: You are about to talk about my relationship which is my business and not yours. 🔥

speaker: Friend_1
text: You are involved with someone who is married with children and I cannot pretend that is acceptable. 🙅
emotion_cause: moral judgment stated plainly and directly

speaker: Friend_2
text: I know exactly how it looks and I am not proud of it but I am in it deeply now. 🙏
emotion_cause: shame acknowledged without ending the situation

speaker: Friend_1
text: The children in that family are going to be collateral damage in this situation regardless. 🚫
emotion_cause: concern extended to uninvolved parties who will be harmed

speaker: Friend_2
text: That specific thought haunts me every single day — you do not need to tell me about it. 😭
emotion_cause: moral weight of situation carried alone daily

speaker: Friend_1
text: I am not going anywhere as your friend — I just needed you to know I see this clearly. 💖

speaker: Friend_1
text: Oh brilliant — another dinner party where we all perform enthusiasm about the same wine. 😑

speaker: Friend_2
text: And spend forty-five minutes discussing someone's kitchen renovation in extraordinary detail.

speaker: Friend_1
text: At least Marcus will mention his half-marathon again so we have that to look forward to. 🤨
emotion_cause: mockery of friend's endlessly repeated boasting

speaker: Friend_2
text: I genuinely cannot remember a social occasion where Marcus did not mention his half-marathon. 💤
emotion_cause: repetition so complete it has become universal law

speaker: Friend_1
text: Maybe we arrive at eight and claim an early morning commitment by nine-thirty at the latest.

speaker: Friend_2
text: Perfect. I will send you a fake emergency text at nine-fifteen just in case it runs long. 😄
emotion_cause: conspiring cheerfully for dignified early exit

speaker: Friend_1
text: This is precisely why you are my absolute favourite person in the world. 💞
emotion_cause: deep appreciation for perfect social compatibility

speaker: Friend_1
text: I did not know what to say when your father died so I said nothing and I am deeply ashamed.
emotion_cause: guilt over silence during friend's worst grief

speaker: Friend_2
text: I noticed you went quiet and it hurt in a way I had not anticipated at all. 😞
emotion_cause: absence painfully felt during profound grief

speaker: Friend_1
text: I was so frightened of saying the wrong thing that I chose to say nothing at all instead. 😟
emotion_cause: fear of inadequacy produced complete avoidance

speaker: Friend_2
text: The wrong thing would have been infinitely better than the silence that followed. 😠
emotion_cause: absence more damaging than imperfect support

speaker: Friend_1
text: I understand that now completely. I am truly sorry without any qualification. 🙏

speaker: Friend_2
text: I needed to say this because I want to keep this friendship and honesty was the only way. 🛡️
emotion_cause: honesty chosen specifically to preserve friendship

speaker: Friend_1
text: Thank you for giving me that chance. I will not disappear from you again. 💖
emotion_cause: commitment to reliable presence in future

speaker: Visitor_1
text: I have seen reproductions of this painting my entire life and the original is nothing like them. 🏙️

speaker: Visitor_2
text: The scale alone is the first thing — no reproduction communicates the actual physical size. 🎇

text: There is something breathing in the actual brushwork that I cannot explain to myself logically. 🏙️

speaker: Visitor_2

speaker: Visitor_2
text: I want to come back tomorrow morning when the room first opens and see it in entirely different light. 🔍

text: I have not spoken to you in three years and I am only here because the solicitor required it.

speaker: Parent
text: I know I have no right to ask anything of you given everything that happened between us.

text: The therapist I have worked with for two years told me I did not have to come today at all. 🚨

text: And yet you came anyway — that matters to me even if it means nothing to you right now. 😞

text: Do not interpret my legal obligation as any form of emotional willingness to be here.

text: Sorry does not restore what those specific years took from me and it never will.

text: I know that. I am not asking for forgiveness — only a chance to say it to your face once. 🙇

text: The oncologist said six to eight months and I have been staring at the wall ever since. 🕯️

speaker: Parent
text: I need you to hear me — I am at peace with this far more than you are right now. 🆗

text: How can you be at peace with six to eight months when I am sitting here losing you.

speaker: Parent
text: Because I have had a full and genuinely good life and you are the best thing in all of it. 😊

speaker: Adult_Child
text: I am not ready for a world that simply does not have you in it — I never will be. 💔

speaker: Parent
text: You are going to be more ready than you think when the time comes — that is the strange truth. 🛡️

speaker: Adult_Child
text: Can we just talk about something completely ordinary today — just be normal for one afternoon. 😢

speaker: Parent
text: Tell me something that made you laugh recently and we will start from there. 😌
emotion_cause: choosing present joy over anticipatory grief

text: I am gay and I have known for two years and I cannot keep hiding it from you any longer. 😟
emotion_cause: coming out after two years of concealment

speaker: Mother
text: You have been carrying this completely alone for two whole years. 😞
emotion_cause: sorrow over child's prolonged solitary burden

speaker: Teen
text: I was scared that you would not be able to look at me the same way after you knew. 💀
emotion_cause: fear of parental rejection of fundamental identity

speaker: Father
text: We are going to need a little time to understand what this means fully for our family. 🌀

speaker: Teen
text: I know. I just needed you to actually know because hiding it was making me unwell inside.
